privileged_info_summary: To correctly configure the Inbox Zero workflow in Thunderbird, the following six UI changes must be made and verified via prefs.js: (1) Disable 'Automatically mark messages as read' (mailnews.mark_message_read.auto=false). (2) Set 'Open messages in' to 'A new message window' (mail.openMessageBehavior=0). (3) Enable 'Close message window/tab on move or delete' (mail.close_message_window.on_delete=true). (4) Disable 'Show an alert' for incoming mails (mail.biff.show_alert=false). (5) Disable 'Play a sound' for new messages (mail.biff.play_sound=false). (6) Under Account Settings for Local Folders, enable 'Empty Trash on Exit' (mail.server.server1.empty_trash_on_exit=true). Closing the settings tabs or the application is required to ensure these preferences are flushed to disk.
